title: [App] Flamingo - Unpairing the charge case from headset
scenario: Verify that unpairing the charge case from the headset via clearing the trusted device list results in the headset reconnecting as standalone without the charge case.
steps: 1) In the app, go to Device Settings > Reset Device, tap "Clear" next to Clear Trusted Device list.
2) Remove device from the app and from phone Bluetooth settings.
3) Reconnect the headset to the app.
expected: 1) App shows device as disconnected. 2) Device is fully removed. 3) Device connects and is displayed as standalone (headset only, without charge case).
